🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one demonstrated a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 to improve a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google's conversational AI system, AMIE, was shown to match primary care physicians in complex disease management in a research paper published in Nature.

🚀 Big Launches.title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Odyssey, a world model maker, secured a $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other major investors.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: MolmoMotion is a language-guided 3D motion forecasting model available on the Hugging Face Hub.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Strands Agents and LeRobot enable developers to deploy models from the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: GLM-5.2 is a long-horizon task-focused model available on the Hugging Face Hub.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Google's conversational AI system, AMIE, was shown to match primary care physicians in complex disease management in a research paper published in Nature.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: MolmoMotion is a language-guided 3D motion forecasting model available on the Hugging Face Hub.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Anthropic joined the Frontier coalition, which received $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Midjourney goes from generating cat images to full-body ultrasound scans
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Midjourney developed an ultrasound-based full-body scanner using AI, marking a significant shift in the company's focus.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Anthropic faced issues with export rules, forcing the company to block access to its AI models for foreign nationals.

tool_of_day.title: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting
tool_of_day.summary: MolmoMotion is a language-guided 3D motion forecasting model available on the Hugging Face Hub.

hot_take: The rapid advancements in AI are causing concerns about its impact on society, with only 16% of Americans believing it will have a positive impact, according to a new study.
